title: Rebecca of Sunnybrook Farm
summaries: "Rebecca of Sunnybrook Farm" by Kate Douglas Wiggin is a children's novel published in 1903. The story follows Rebecca Rowena Randall, a spirited and imaginative young girl sent to live with her two aunts in rural Maine. While one aunt is stern and critical, the other offers protection and kindness. Rebecca's joy for life brightens those around her, but she must navigate trials and meet rigid expectations as she grows into a talented young woman with dreams of her own.
